title: Crispy Corn Fritters
description: A spicy twist on traditional corn fritters, these crispy bites are perfect for snacking or as a side dish.
instructions: Preheat oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
In a bowl, whisk together flour, stir-fry sauce, and eggs.
Add corn kernels, crispy fried onions, and spicy chili flakes to the bowl and mix well.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry for 3-4 minutes, until crispy and golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
